string 1: To a World Far, Far Away
Defeat an enemy for the first time.
Convert a Digimon with a Scan Rate of 200%.
Get caught in the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building explosion.
Travel through time into the past.
Visit the special dimension that exists between space-time worlds known as the In-Between.
Restore the reactor located in the Factorial Area.
Drive the Titans from the Abyss Area.
Return to Shinjuku eight years in the future.
Light the light clock's final light.
Renew the vow that Aegiomon pledged under the starry sky.
Bring an end to the story.
Complete the game on Mega + difficulty.
Achieve a rating of "EXCELLENT!!!" when attacking an enemy's weak point.
Defeat an enemy of Ultimate or greater Generation with a single DigiAttack.
Digivolve a Digimon for the first time.
De-Digivolve a Digimon for the first time.
Train Digimon on the Digifarm 30 times.
Register Chronomon: Destroy Mode in the Field Guide.
Raise your Agent Rank to the maximum level.
Become champion of The Greatest OMNI Carnival.
Collect all of Hiroko Sagisaka's Monikers.
Collect all of Etemon's Soul Bits.
Collect all of Dr. Kuga's Core Dumps.
Summon all of the Royal Knights to Central Tower.
Discover all of the Outer Dungeons.
Solve all of the Outer Dungeons' mysteries.
